title: As Long As You Love Me
title_raw: As Long As You Love Me
group_key: as long as you love me|justin bieber,big sean

writers.lyricist: Justin Bieber/Sean Michael Anderson/Nasri Tony Atweh/Rodney Jerkins/Andre Lindal
writers.composer: Justin Bieber/Sean Michael Anderson/Nasri Tony Atweh/Rodney Jerkins/Andre Lindal

lyrics.text: As long as you love me
lyrics.translation: 只要你爱我就好

lyrics.text: As long as you love me
lyrics.translation: 只要你爱我就好

lyrics.text: As long as you love me
lyrics.translation: 只要你爱我就好

lyrics.text: We're under pressure, seven billion people in the world trying to fit in
lyrics.translation: 我们的爱倍受压迫，全世界七十亿人都试图融入

lyrics.text: Keep it together, smile on your face even though your heart is frowning
lyrics.translation: 十指紧握，你的心中皱眉但却面挂笑靥

lyrics.text: But hey now, you know girl, we both know it’s a cruel world
lyrics.translation: 而现在，女孩你知道，我们都知道这是一个残酷的世界

lyrics.text: But I will take my chances
lyrics.translation: 但我会抓住所有希望

lyrics.text: As long as you love me, we could be starving,
lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我，我们可以食不果腹

lyrics.text: We could be homeless, we could be broke
lyrics.translation: 可以流离失所，也可以穷困潦倒

lyrics.text: As long as you love me I'll be your platinum, I'll be your silver, I'll be your gold
lyrics.translation: 会是你的不离不弃，你的无坚不摧，你的所向披靡

lyrics.text: As long as you lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-love me love me
lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我

lyrics.text: As long as you lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-love me love me
lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我

lyrics.text: I'll be your soldier, fighting every second of the day for the dreams girl
lyrics.translation: 我将是你的战士，每分每秒为你的梦想而战斗

lyrics.text: I'll be your Hova, you can be my Destiny's Child on a stinger
lyrics.translation: 我将成为你的平民，因为你就是我的真命天女

lyrics.text: So don't stress, don't cry, oh we don't need no wings to fly
lyrics.translation: 所以不要害怕，不要流泪，我们不需要翅膀也能飞向未来

lyrics.text: Just take my hand
lyrics.translation: 只要你紧紧握着我的手

lyrics.text: As long as you love me we could be starving,
lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我，我们可以食不果腹

lyrics.text: We could be homeless, we could be broke
lyrics.translation: 可以流离失所，也可以穷困潦倒

lyrics.text: As long as you love me I'll be your platinum, I'll be your silver, I'll be your gold
lyrics.translation: 我会是你的不离不弃，你的无坚不摧，你的所向披靡

lyrics.text: As long as you lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-love me love me
lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我

lyrics.text: As long as you lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-love me love me
lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我

lyrics.text: Big Sean
I don't  know if this make sense
lyrics.translation: 我不知道这样做有无道理

lyrics.text: But you're my hallelujah
lyrics.translation: 但你是我的唯一

lyrics.text: Give me a time and place, I'll rendezvous
lyrics.translation: 给我时间和地址，世界崩裂我也会赴约

lyrics.text: I'll fly you to it, I'll beat you there
lyrics.translation: 我会飞去那里，我会一路拼到那里

lyrics.text: Girl you know I got you
lyrics.translation: 女孩，你知道我已拥有你

lyrics.text: Us, trust, a couple things I can't spell without you
lyrics.translation: “我们”“信任”这样形容爱人的词语，没有你我不会拼写

lyrics.text: Now we on top of the world
lyrics.translation: 我们在世界的顶端

lyrics.text: Cause that's just how we do
lyrics.translation: 这就是我们要做的

lyrics.text: Used to tell me sky's the limit
lyrics.translation: 曾经有人说天空是我们的束缚

lyrics.text: Now the skies are point of view
lyrics.translation: 现在却是我们视域下的的风景

lyrics.text: Man we stepping out like woah(oh god)
lyrics.translation: 我们站出来惊讶

lyrics.text: Cameras point at you, ask me what's my best side
lyrics.translation: 要拍摄的时候，问我哪里最美

lyrics.text: I'll stand back and point at you, you, you
lyrics.translation: 我退后一步指向你

lyrics.text: The one that I argue with,
lyrics.translation: 那个我和她争吵之后

lyrics.text: Feel like I need a new girl to be bothered with
lyrics.translation: 觉得自己需要换一个新的女孩来烦自己的人

lyrics.text: But the grass ain't always greener on the other side
lyrics.translation: 但是别的地方的草

lyrics.text: It's greener where you water it
lyrics.translation: 并不如你用心浇灌的那样绿

lyrics.text: So I know, we got issues baby, true true true
lyrics.translation: 这时我明白了，宝贝，我们已经有了默契

lyrics.text: But I rather work on this with you
lyrics.translation: 所以我会和你一起走下去

lyrics.text: Than then go ahead and start with someone new
lyrics.translation: 而不是找一个新的女孩重新开始

lyrics.text: As long as you love me we could be starving
lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我，我们可以食不果腹

lyrics.text: We could be homeless, we could be broke
lyrics.translation: 可以流离失所，也可以穷困潦倒

lyrics.text: As long as you love me I'll be your platinum, I'll be your silver, I'll be your gold
lyrics.translation: 我会是你的不离不弃，你的无坚不摧，你的所向披靡

lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我

lyrics.translation: 只要你仍爱我
